text.title: Distribution Channel Research Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Distribution Channel Research methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: consider-19
step.action: Score all 19 channels against fit signals; emit rejection log.
step.decision-gate: If fewer than 19, halt and complete the catalog.

step.name: design-tests
step.action: For each channel: design <=$500 test with explicit stop-loss + success metric.
step.decision-gate: Refuse any test missing budget_usd or stop-loss.

step.name: run-tests-parallel
step.action: Run all 3 tests in parallel; collect CAC + reach + time-to-signal + D30.
step.decision-gate: Abort any test the moment spend > budget_usd.

step.name: score-and-pick
step.action: Multi-axis score; pick primary + secondary; reject anything D30 < 40%.
